completed_slice: Recovered and committed the append-reconciled effective-state rule for canonical baselines and later owner-scoped records.
verified_claims: Canonical queue files are historical baselines at specific blobs, not automatically the newest effective state.
Later admissible owner-scoped records may supersede only the fields or claims they explicitly address.
Hard boundaries and specialist-governance rules constrain replay and cannot be weakened by team-local updates.
Conflicts without deterministic causal precedence must remain unresolved rather than being silently selected.
W-001 being active is compatible with a completed Afterimage slice because overall acceptance evidence remains incomplete.
remaining: Implement a deterministic effective-state reducer with schema validation, owner checks, commit reachability, field-level provenance, and unresolved-conflict output.
Enumerate all admissible record classes and schema migration rules.
Generate a materialized effective-state view without modifying canonical baselines or additive history.
privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and abstract reconciliation semantics only; no private chat, health, credentials, identifying personal data, or unreviewed uploads.
